message:
fix(pager): update header bytes 18-19 when switching journal mode

When set_journal_mode() switches to WAL, set write_version and
read_version (bytes 18-19) to 2 in the on-disk database header.
When switching back to a rollback journal mode (DELETE, etc.), revert
them to 1. Without this, standard SQLite tools cannot detect WAL mode
from the on-disk header and fail to look for the WAL file.

Reads page 1 from the database file, patches the two version bytes,
writes it back, and evicts the cached copy — following the same
pattern used by patch_page1_header in the checkpoint writer.

Adds test_set_journal_mode_updates_header_version_bytes to verify
bytes 18-19 are correct after toggling between WAL and DELETE modes.

Closes beads_rust #156.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
